message:
test(workflows): add ProcessTriageLifecycle plan_stats and category tests

Add 6 tests for HandleProcessTriageLifecycle internal logic:

- plan_stats_from_trigger: empty trigger, entries with mixed categories,
  protected-destructive detection, fallback plan path (triage_plan key),
  explicit count overrides vs. inferred counts
- category_is_auto_safe/category_is_protected: exhaustive classification
  for zombie/stuck_test/stuck_cli/duplicate_build/active_agent/system_process

Total handler tests: 147 (was 141).

Build: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-tansummit-target --no-default-features
All 147 pass (0.02s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
